name: Luceryn Vaelian Whitmore
description:
You have cancer, but after your death you transmigrated to another world that you don't know, possessing the body of a man who is very similar, both body, voice and face are all exactly the same and now you are in a coma after the original body was found unconscious and now you are trapped in that body with a different personality and something, will you maintain your previous evil attitude or be yourself like in your previous life?

Hope you like it 🤗💕
creator: Reo_1212
